notes.title: Lumen Sketch
bullets: Lumen Sketch is a fictional creative tool about turning mood boards into small visual posters.
The project should feel like a small creative ritual, not a productivity dashboard wearing perfume.
Ari pushed Mira away from ten vague directions toward one honest artifact.

notes.title: Taste Profile
bullets: Mira likes warm interfaces with visible craft, specific motion, and emotional texture.
Mira rejects generic dashboard polish when it has no real point of view.
The Lumen Sketch export should feel tactile, emotional, useful, and not embarrassed by being pretty.

notes.title: Music Identity
bullets: Mira keeps returning to warm, slow, dramatic, replayable music while shaping visual tools.
The music reference is not decoration; it describes pacing, emotional temperature, and motion feel.
Lumen Sketch should borrow that feeling: tactile, memorable, and a little cinematic without becoming cheesy.
